user.title: cTrader App Credentials
user.description:
Before starting, register your app at https://openapi.ctrader.com and get Spotware approval.

Enter your app credentials below.

data.redirect_uri: Redirect URI (must match the one registered in your cTrader app)

open_url.title: Authorize Your Account
open_url.description:
Open the link below in your browser to authorize this integration with your cTrader account:

**{auth_uri}**

Log in with your cTID and click **Allow access**. You'll be redirected to your redirect URI with a `code` parameter in the URL.

Once done, click **Next** to enter the code.

auth_code.title: Enter Authorization Code
auth_code.description:
From the redirect URL, copy the value of the `code` parameter and paste it below.

Example: `https://your-redirect-uri/?code=XXXXXXXX` → paste `XXXXXXXX`

error.invalid_auth: Could not authenticate with those tokens. Check your credentials and try again.
error.token_exchange_failed: Failed to exchange the authorization code. Make sure the code is correct and hasn't expired (valid for ~1 minute).

abort.already_configured: This cTrader account is already configured
